title: Authored Ability Asset
description: JSON schema for a URPG native gameplay ability definition (AuthoredAbilityAsset). Used for schema-validated authoring, migration proof fixtures, and compat-to-native mapping.

schema.description: Self-identifying schema reference. Must be present for runtime contract validation.

ability_id.description: Unique string identifier for this ability. Must be non-empty. Dot-namespaced IDs are conventional (e.g. 'skill.fire_bolt').

cooldown_seconds.description: Recharge time in seconds after the ability is used. 0 means no cooldown.

effect_id.description: Identifier of the gameplay effect applied on activation.

effect_attribute.description: Name of the attribute modified by the effect (e.g. 'Attack', 'Defense', 'HP').

effect_operation.description: How the modifier is combined with the current attribute value.

effect_value.description: Scalar value of the attribute modification.

effect_duration.description: Duration in seconds for the applied effect. 0 means instantaneous.

pattern.description: AoE/range pattern for the ability. A single-point pattern (origin only) represents a single-target ability.

active_condition.description: Optional bounded activation condition. Supported grammar is comparisons over source.hp, source.mp, source.attribute.<Name>, source.hasTag('Tag.Name'), target.hasTag('Tag.Name'), boolean literals, and &&/|| connectors. Unsupported grammar fails closed at runtime with condition_parse_error.

passive_condition.description: Optional authored passive-condition string preserved for future cancellation/passive behavior. The current runtime does not evaluate passive conditions.

unsupported_fields.description: Fallback container for source fields that have no native mapping. Preserved verbatim for round-trip fidelity. Runtime ignores this field.

boundedCondition.description: Bounded expression grammar: <operand> <operator> <operand> clauses joined by && or ||. Numeric operands: source.hp, source.mp, source.attribute.<Name>, or numeric literals. Boolean operands: true, false, source.hasTag('Tag.Name'), target.hasTag('Tag.Name'). Operators: >, >=, <, <=, ==, !=. Parentheses and arithmetic are intentionally unsupported.

patternField.description: 2D coordinate pattern. See content/schemas/pattern_field.schema.json for full specification.
